prayers.title: Prayer Book
prayers.quote: Prayer is the weapon of the believer.

assistant.title: Islamic Assistant
assistant.welcomeMessage: As-salamu alaykum! I am your Islamic Assistant. How can I help you?
assistant.errorMessage: Sorry, an error occurred. Please try again.
assistant.limitReached: You have reached your daily question limit. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited access.
assistant.betaWelcomeHint: Beta mode: You can click on ready-made questions or type a similar question.
assistant.betaUnknownQuestion: This question is not currently in the Beta ready-answer list. You can click one of the sample questions below.
assistant.betaInputPlaceholder: Beta: type one of the ready questions or select from below

answers.q1: To pray regularly, start small: create a short preparation routine at the same time every day, turn on reminders, and if you miss one prayer, restart at the next one.
answers.q2: To build a Quran reading habit, set aside a fixed 5-10 minutes daily. Aim for consistency, not duration.
answers.q3: For dhikr goals, the 'little but consistent' method is recommended. Start with a small number and increase weekly.
answers.q4: When focus is difficult, take a short break, breathe deeply, and return to a single goal. Single-tasking is more productive than multitasking.
answers.q5: For spiritual motivation, making a short daily prayer, writing a gratitude note, and doing an end-of-day reflection can be very effective.
answers.q6: This section currently operates as a Beta ready Q&A assistant. Enhanced live chat support will be added soon.

ayetel_kursi.title: آية الكرسي
ayetel_kursi.arabic: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ...
ayetel_kursi.transliteration: Allahu la ilahe illa huvel hayyul kayyum...
ayetel_kursi.meaning: الله لا إله إلا هو الحي القيوم...

tevekkul_duasi.title: دعاء التوكل
tevekkul_duasi.arabic: حَسْبِيَ اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ
tevekkul_duasi.transliteration: Hasbiyallahu la ilahe illa hu aleyhi tevekkeltü
tevekkul_duasi.meaning: حسبي الله لا إله إلا هو عليه توكلت

estagfirullah.title: الاستغفار
estagfirullah.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ الَّذِي لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ
estagfirullah.meaning: أستغفر الله الذي لا إله إلا هو

today.avoidDesc: Mark if you committed these sins - awareness is key!

motivation.0: Every good deed is a step, every step brings you closer to Jannah.
motivation.1: Do it without belittling, Allah judges by intention.
motivation.2: The good you do today will find you tomorrow.
motivation.3: He who perseveres wins, keep going!
motivation.4: Be better every day than the one before.
motivation.5: The door of mercy is always open.
motivation.6: Consistent deeds, even if small, are beloved.
motivation.7: Let your intention be beautiful, your deed will be blessed.

fasting.alwaysNafile: You can always observe voluntary fasting

whiteDays.desc: Recommended to fast on 13th, 14th, 15th of the month

arafah.name: Day of Arafah Fasting
arafah.desc: Great reward for those not on Hajj

ui.subtitle: Greeting cards you can send to your loved ones
ui.downloaded: Greeting card downloaded! You can share it from your gallery.

ramazan1.title: Welcome Ramadan
ramazan1.message: May your Ramadan, the sultan of eleven months, be blessed. May Allah accept all your prayers in this month.

ramazan2.title: Iftar Invitation
ramazan2.message: We would be happy to see you at our Iftar table. Have a blessed Iftar.

ramazan3.title: Sahur Blessings
ramazan3.message: May your Sahur be blessed and your fasting accepted. Have a blessed Sahur.

ramazan4.title: Laylat al-Qadr
ramazan4.message: May your Laylat al-Qadr, which is better than a thousand months, be blessed. May your prayers be accepted.

bayram1.title: Eid al-Fitr
bayram1.message: Happy Eid al-Fitr. May the Eid pass in health and peace with your loved ones.

bayram2.title: Eid al-Adha
bayram2.message: Blessed Eid al-Adha. May your sacrifices be accepted and your prayers answered.

bayram3.title: Eid Joy
bayram3.message: Eid means peace, happiness and love. Many happy returns with your loved ones.

bayram4.title: Eid Prayer
bayram4.message: May your Eid prayers be accepted and your supplications answered. Have a blessed Eid.

kandil1.title: Mawlid Kandil
kandil1.message: Blessed Mawlid Kandil, the birthday of our Prophet who was sent as a mercy to the worlds.

kandil2.title: Regaib Kandil
kandil2.message: Blessed Regaib Kandil, the beginning of the three holy months. May Allah accept your prayers.

kandil3.title: Miraj Kandil
kandil3.message: Blessed Miraj Kandil, the anniversary of our Prophet's ascension.

kandil4.title: Berat Kandil
kandil4.message: Blessed Berat Kandil, the night of forgiveness. May Allah forgive all our sins.

cuma1.title: Blessed Friday
cuma1.message: Have a blessed Friday. May Allah accept your prayers.

cuma2.title: Friday Blessings
cuma2.message: May your Friday, the best of days, be fruitful. Blessed Friday.

cuma3.title: Friday Prayer
cuma3.message: It is heralded that prayers made on this blessed day will be accepted. May your prayers be accepted.

cuma4.title: Friday Greeting
cuma4.message: May your Friday be blessed, your heart peaceful, and your home abundant. With peace and prayer...

cuma5.title: Friday Message
cuma5.message: Blessed Friday! May Allah accept all your prayers on this blessed day and give peace to your heart.

cuma6.title: Friday Salawat
cuma6.message: May it be a day where you send many salawats to our Prophet and your prayers are accepted.

cuma7.title: Friday Mercy
cuma7.message: May the mercy of Friday be upon you. Many happy Fridays with your family in health and peace.

cuma8.title: Friday Salah
cuma8.message: May your Friday prayers be accepted. May the grace and blessings of this day be upon you. Blessed Friday.

dogum1.title: Birthday
dogum1.message: Many healthy, peaceful and faithful years. May Allah grant you a long life and a good life.

dogum2.title: Happy Birthday
dogum2.message: May your new age be full of health, happiness and success. Happy birthday.

gecmis1.title: Get Well Soon
gecmis1.message: May Allah heal you, I wish you a speedy recovery. May Allah grant you health.

gecmis2.title: Healing Wish
gecmis2.message: Healing comes from Allah. May Allah grant speedy recovery. Get well soon.

taziye1.title: Condolences
taziye1.message: My condolences. I wish Allah's mercy on the deceased and patience for you and your family. May their place be paradise.

taziye2.title: Deepest Sympathy
taziye2.message: May Allah have mercy, may their place be paradise. I wish patience and fortitude to those left behind.

hayirli1.title: Congratulations
hayirli1.message: Congratulations on your new [home/car/job]. May Allah give its blessings.

hayirli2.title: Enjoy It
hayirli2.message: Congratulations, enjoy it. May Allah protect from the evil eye and give blessings.

hayirli3.title: New Job
hayirli3.message: Congratulations on your new job. May Allah make your sustenance plentiful and your work fruitful.

arefe1.title: Day of Arafah
arefe1.message: Blessed Day of Arafah. Fasting today is an expiation for the sins of the past and coming year.

hicri1.title: Hijri New Year
hicri1.message: Happy Hijri New Year. May the new year lead to goodness and your prayers be accepted.

asure1.title: Day of Ashura
asure1.message: Blessed Day of Ashura. Fasting on the 10th day of Muharram is Sunnah. Happy Ashura.

ucaylar1.title: Three Months
ucaylar1.message: Blessed Three Months. May the months of Rajab, Shaban and Ramadan lead to goodness.

teravih1.title: Tarawih Prayer
teravih1.message: May your Tarawih prayers be accepted. I wish you to benefit from the grace of these blessed nights.

mukabele1.title: Mukabele
mukabele1.message: Have a blessed day listening to Mukabele. May the grace of the Quran be upon you.

adhkar.benefit1: Protection until evening for morning readers
adhkar.benefit6: Sufficiency in worldly and afterlife matters
adhkar.benefitEvening4: Protection from bad dreams and whispers

ayetel_kursi.title: Ayatul Kursi
ayetel_kursi.arabic: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ...
ayetel_kursi.transliteration: Allahu la ilahe illa huvel hayyul kayyum...
ayetel_kursi.meaning: Allah! There is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of [all] existence...

felak.title: Surah Al-Falaq
felak.meaning: Say, "I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak..."

nas.title: Surah An-Nas
nas.meaning: Say, "I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind..."

sabah_duasi.title: Morning Dua
sabah_duasi.meaning: We have reached the morning and at this very time all sovereignty belongs to Allah

tevekkul_duasi.title: Reliance Dua
tevekkul_duasi.arabic: حَسْبِيَ اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ
tevekkul_duasi.transliteration: Hasbiyallahu la ilahe illa hu aleyhi tevekkeltü
tevekkul_duasi.meaning: Sufficient for me is Allah; there is no deity except Him. On Him I have relied

subhanallah.title: Subhanallah wa bihamdihi
subhanallah.meaning: Glory be to Allah and His is the praise

aksam_duasi.title: Evening Dua
aksam_duasi.meaning: We have reached the evening and at this very time all sovereignty belongs to Allah

uyku_oncesi.title: Before Sleep
uyku_oncesi.meaning: In Your Name, O Allah, I die and I live

estagfirullah.title: Istighfar
estagfirullah.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ الَّذِي لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ
estagfirullah.meaning: I seek forgiveness from Allah, there is no deity but Him

qibla.title: Qibla Compass
qibla.instructions: Hold your phone parallel to the ground and calibrate by drawing figure 8.
qibla.permissionDenied: Compass permission denied. Please enable in settings.
qibla.notSupported: Compass feature is not supported on this device.

home.notificationPrompt: Would you like to enable notifications so you don't miss prayer times?
home.locationReasonIntro: Huzur needs your location to provide better service for the following purposes:
home.locationPrayer: Show prayer times based on your location
home.locationPrivacy: Your location is only used while the app is open and is not sent to any server.
home.dailyTasksSubtitle: Small steps every day for great rewards

ayet.title: From Quran
ayet.desc: Wise verses from the Holy Quran

1.text: Prayer is the essence of worship.

3.text: The best of people are those who benefit others.

4.text: Good character is half of religion.

5.text: A Muslim is one from whose tongue and hands others are safe.

6.text: Wisdom is the lost property of the believer.

8.text: An hour of reflection is better than a year of worship.

9.text: Seeking knowledge is obligatory for every Muslim.

10.text: The heart is the house of God.

11.text: The ego is the greatest enemy.

12.text: Manners are the face and language of the mind.

14.text: Patience is a bitter tree but its fruit is sweet.

15.text: Humility opens doors, arrogance closes them.

16.text: When I left myself, only You remained.

17.text: Come, whoever you are, come again.

18.text: Love is the language of silence.

19.text: The heart is a mirror, keep it clean.

20.text: Turn to the One God, do not drown in multiplicity.

21.text: The door of the heart opens with remembrance.

22.text: The world is a bridge, do not build your home on it.

23.text: The Sufi is the son of his time.

24.text: Those who remember Allah find peace in their hearts.

26.text: Allah is with those who are patient.

27.text: Whoever relies on Allah, He is sufficient for them.

28.text: Your Lord said: Call upon Me, I will answer you.

29.text: Those who do good will receive the best reward.

30.text: Whoever repents and does good, Allah accepts their repentance.

31.text: The best charity is to learn knowledge and to teach it.

32.text: Paradise lies under the feet of mothers.

34.text: Greeting with a smiling face is charity.

35.text: Whoever plants a tree earns reward for each person who eats from its fruit.

36.text: A grateful heart, a patient body, a tongue that remembers.

37.text: The intention of the believer is better than their deed.

38.text: There are two blessings which many people lose: health and free time.

39.text: Intellect is knowledge without practice; knowledge is intellect without application.

40.text: The world is the farm of the hereafter.

41.text: True wealth is the richness of the soul.

42.text: A believer is the mirror of a believer.

43.text: Death is sufficient as an adviser.

44.text: He who does not give thanks for blessings prepares for their increase in calamity.

45.text: A person's worth is measured by the height of their aspiration.

46.text: Generosity is a tree whose roots are in Paradise.

47.text: Silence is the gate of wisdom.

48.text: A person is hidden beneath their tongue.

49.text: Knowledge is for action; without action, knowledge becomes a burden.

51.text: Supplication is the essence of worship.

52.text: Whoever guides someone to do good earns the same reward as the one who does it.

53.text: Lawful sustenance is the essence of worship.

54.text: A true friend speaks bitter truths.

55.text: Think of those before you and be patient; think of those after you and be content.

56.text: Hardness of the heart comes from excessive laughter and eating.

57.text: The most disliked permissible thing in the sight of Allah is divorce.

58.text: He who sleeps full while his neighbor is hungry does not truly believe.

59.text: Whoever puts their trust in Allah, He is sufficient for them.

60.text: Say: My Lord, increase me in knowledge.

stories.fridayContent: O Allah! On this blessed Friday, accept our prayers. Protect us, our loved ones, and the entire Ummah of Muhammad. Blessed Friday...
stories.downloadedAlert: Story downloaded! You can share from your gallery.

duas.0: Our Lord! Give us good in this world and good in the Hereafter, and protect us from the torment of the Fire.
duas.1: O Allah! I ask You for guidance, piety, chastity, and contentment of heart.
duas.2: O Turner of hearts! Make my heart firm upon Your religion.
duas.3: O Allah! Forgive me, my parents, and all believers.
duas.4: O Allah! As You have made my creation beautiful, beautify my character too.
duas.5: O Allah! Make us among those who are grateful for Your blessings.
duas.6: O Allah! Grant me the ability to work for Your pleasure.
duas.7: My Lord! Increase me in knowledge and count me among the righteous.
duas.8: O Allah! Grant us health, well-being, and peace.
duas.9: Our Lord! Pour upon us patience and let us die as Muslims.

verses.0: Our Lord! Do not hold us accountable if we forget or make a mistake.
verses.1: Our Lord! Give us good in this world and good in the Hereafter.
verses.2: Our Lord! Do not let our hearts deviate after You have guided us.
verses.3: Those who say 'Our Lord is Allah' and then remain steadfast...
verses.4: Whoever puts their trust in Allah, He will be sufficient for them.
verses.5: Whoever does good, male or female, while believing, We will grant them a good life.
verses.6: My Lord! Let me enter with truth and exit with truth.
verses.7: Indeed, it is in the remembrance of Allah that hearts find peace.
verses.8: Our Lord! Grant us from our spouses and offspring the comfort of our eyes.
verses.9: Our Lord! Perfect our light and forgive us.

hadiths.0: Make things easy, do not make things difficult; give glad tidings, do not drive people away.
hadiths.1: A believer is not stung from the same hole twice.
hadiths.5: The best among you are those who learn the Quran and teach it.
hadiths.6: He who shows no mercy will not be shown mercy.
hadiths.7: None of you truly believes until he loves for his brother what he loves for himself.
hadiths.8: Allah is beautiful and loves beauty.
hadiths.9: Seeking knowledge is an obligation upon every Muslim.

quotes.0: One who sees beauty thinks beautifully. One who thinks beautifully takes pleasure from life.
quotes.1: Yesterday I was clever, so I wanted to change the world. Today I am wise, so I am changing myself.
quotes.2: Let us love, let us be loved. This world belongs to no one.
quotes.3: I would serve forty years as a slave to the one who teaches me a single letter.
quotes.4: Justice is the foundation of sovereignty.
quotes.5: All words belong to yesterday. Now new things must be said.
quotes.6: Keep humans alive so that the state may live.
quotes.7: Master your hands, your loins, and your tongue.
quotes.8: To leave behind works like giants, one must work like ants.
quotes.9: This is the world; how much we valued it. Yet it was a field; we were to sow, harvest, and leave.

dailyDuas.0: O Allah! By Your power we have reached the morning, by Your power we will reach the evening. By Your power we live, by Your power we die. To You is the return.
dailyDuas.1: O Allah! By Your grace we have reached the evening, by Your grace we will reach the morning. By Your grace we live, by Your grace we die. To You is the return.
dailyDuas.2: All praise is due to Allah who has fed us, given us drink, and made us Muslims.
dailyDuas.3: O Allah! Protect us on our journey and take care of our family we left behind.
dailyDuas.4: O Allah! Lord of mankind! Remove the illness, cure the disease. You are the one who cures. There is no cure except Your cure.
dailyDuas.5: O Allah! I seek refuge in You from anxiety, sorrow, incapacity, laziness, miserliness, and cowardice.
dailyDuas.6: O Allah! Make the provision You have given us blessed and make us content.
dailyDuas.7: My Lord! Increase me in knowledge and count me among the righteous.
dailyDuas.8: O Allah! You are the Most Forgiving, You love to forgive, so forgive me.
dailyDuas.9: O Allah! I ask You for the good of this world and the Hereafter. Fulfill my needs.

week_streak.title: Weekly Streak
week_streak.req: Complete tasks for 7 days in a row

1.text: Make things easy and do not make them difficult, cheer the people up by conveying glad tidings to them and do not repulse (them).

2.text: The best of people are those that bring most benefit to the rest of mankind.

4.text: The intention of a believer is better than his action.

5.text: The patient one will be victorious.

6.text: If you feel no shame, then do as you wish.

7.text: The world is the field of the Hereafter.

8.text: Seek knowledge even if it is in China.

9.text: He who knows himself knows his Lord.

10.text: Getting along well with people is half of intelligence.

12.text: The heart is like a container. Whatever you put in it, you get out.

13.text: The greatest jihad is to battle your own soul.

15.text: Truth is bitter but its result is sweet.

16.text: You think you are a small body, yet the greatest world is hidden within you.

18.text: Do not get stuck between yesterday and tomorrow, be busy with today.

19.text: Love the created for the sake of the Creator.

20.text: Love is all there is in the universe, knowledge is but gossip.

22.text: The heart wants neither coffee nor coffeehouse, the heart wants conversation, coffee is an excuse.

23.text: Speak the best of words or remain silent.

26.text: My Lord, expand for me my breast and ease for me my task.

27.text: No bearer of burdens will bear the burden of another.

29.text: Unquestionably, by the remembrance of Allah hearts are assured.

30.text: Perhaps you dislike a thing and it is good for you.

tajweed.title: Tajweed Tutor
tajweed.subtitle: Learn Quran reading rules

aiCheck.title: Tajweed Check (AI)
aiCheck.desc: Record your recitation, let AI find your mistakes.

tajweed.audioNotReady: Audio file for this example is not ready yet.

idgam_meal_gunne.title: Idgham Ma'al Ghunnah
idgam_meal_gunne.desc: It means reading with emphasis (shaddah) while making a nasal sound (ghunnah).
idgam_meal_gunne.rule: It occurs if one of the letters (ي م ن و) comes after Sakin Nun (نْ) or Tanween (ً ٍ ٌ).

0.explanation: The letter Nun merges into the letter Ya.

1.explanation: The letter Nun merges into the letter Mim.

idgam-bila-gunne.title: Idgham Bila Ghunnah
idgam-bila-gunne.desc: It means reading with emphasis (shaddah) without making a nasal sound (ghunnah).
idgam-bila-gunne.rule: It occurs if one of the letters (ل ر) comes after Sakin Nun or Tanween.

0.explanation: Nun is not pronounced, Ra is read with shaddah.

1.explanation: Tanween merges into the letter Lam.

ihfa.title: Ikhfa
ihfa.desc: If one of the Ikhfa letters comes after Sakin Nun or Tanween, the Nun sound is hidden and read with a nasal sound.
ihfa.rule: It occurs if one of the Ikhfa letters comes after Sakin Nun or Tanween.

1.explanation: The Nun sound is hidden while transitioning to the letter Shin.

izhar.title: Izhar
izhar.desc: If one of the throat letters comes after Sakin Nun or Tanween, the Nun sound is read clearly.
izhar.rule: It occurs if one of the throat letters comes after Sakin Nun or Tanween.

0.explanation: The Nun sound is pronounced clearly.

iklab.title: Iqlab
iklab.desc: If the letter Ba (ب) comes after Sakin Nun or Tanween, the Nun sound turns into the Mim (م) sound.
iklab.rule: It occurs if the letter Ba (ب) comes after Sakin Nun or Tanween.

kalkale.title: Qalqalah
kalkale.desc: When Qalqalah letters are sakin (with sukoon), they are read with a vibration (echoing sound).
kalkale.rule: It occurs when Qalqalah letters are sakin (with sukoon).

1.explanation: The letter Dal is vibrated at the end.

family.desc: Prayers for family unity and peace at home

special_days.desc: Special prayers for blessed days and nights

repentance.name: Repentance Prayers
repentance.desc: Prayers for purification from sins and repentance

prayer_duas.name: Salah Prayers
prayer_duas.desc: Prayers to be recited during and after Salah

distress.name: Prayers for Distress
distress.desc: Prayers to be recited in difficult times and moments of sadness

1.title: Sabah Duası
1.meaning: Sabahladık ve mülk Allah'ındır, hamd Allah'adır.

2.title: Akşam Duası
2.meaning: Akşamladık ve mülk Allah'ındır, hamd Allah'adır.

3.title: Yatarken Okunacak Dua
3.meaning: Allah'ım! Senin adınla ölür ve senin adınla diriliyorum.

5.title: Eve Girerken Dua
5.meaning: Allah'ım! Senden giriş ve çıkışın hayırlısını isterim.

6.title: Ayetel Kürsi
6.meaning: Allah, O'ndan başka ilah yoktur. Diridir, Kaim'dir.

8.title: Korunma Duası
8.meaning: O'nun ismiyle beraber hiçbir şey zarar vermez.

10.title: İstiğfar
10.meaning: Allah'tan bağışlanma dilerim ve O'na tevbe ederim.

17.title: Rızık Genişliği
17.meaning: Allah'ım! Keder ve üzüntüden sana sığınırım.

18.title: Bereket Duası
18.meaning: Allah'ım! Bize verdiğin rızkı bereketli kıl.

24.title: İşlerin Kolaylaşması
24.meaning: Allah'ım! Sen kolaylaştırmadıkça hiçbir şey kolay olmaz.

25.title: Hasbünallah
25.meaning: Allah bize yeter, O ne güzel vekildir.

27.title: Çıkış Yolu
27.meaning: Kim Allah'tan korkarsa, ona çıkış yolu gösterir.

28.title: Aile Huzuru
28.meaning: Rabbimiz! Eşlerimizden ve çocuklarımızdan göz aydınlığı ver.

30.title: Çocuklar İçin
30.meaning: Rabbim! Bana temiz bir nesil bağışla.

33.title: Çocukların Salihlği
33.meaning: Rabbim! Beni ve neslimden gelenleri namaz kılan eyle.

38.title: Aile Birliği
38.meaning: Rabbimiz! Bizi sana teslim olanlardan eyle.

41.title: Nazar Duası
41.meaning: Allah'ın dilediği oldu, güç ancak Allah'tandır.

42.title: Kelime-i Tevhid
42.meaning: Allah'tan başka ilah yoktur, Muhammed Allah'ın Resulüdür.

43.title: Kötülüklerden Sığınma
43.meaning: Yarattığı şeylerin şerrinden Allah'ın tam kelimelerine sığınırım.

48.title: Kaza Beladan Korunma
48.meaning: Allah'ım! Nimetin yok olmasından sana sığınırım.

50.title: İman Korunması
50.meaning: Allah'ım! Kalpleri çeviren! Kalbimi dinin üzere sabit kıl.

52.title: Hayır Dua
52.meaning: Rabbimiz! Dünyada da ahirette de iyilik ver.

60.title: Salih Amel
60.meaning: Beni rahmetinle salih kulların arasına kat.

62.title: İbadet Kabul
62.meaning: Rabbimiz! Bizden kabul et, sen işitensin, bilensin.

63.title: Makbul Dua
63.meaning: Allah'ım! Sen affedicisin, affetmeyi seversin, beni affet.

64.title: Kunut Duası
64.meaning: Allah'ım! Hidayete erdirdiklerinle beni de hidayete erdir.

65.title: Seyyidul İstiğfar
65.meaning: Allah'ım! Sen benim Rabbimsin, senden başka ilah yoktur.

66.title: Yolculuk Duası
66.meaning: Bunu bize boyun eğdireni tespih ederim.

67.title: Yemek Duası
67.meaning: Allah'ım! Bize verdiğin rızkı bereketli kıl.

73.title: Abdest Duası
73.meaning: Allah'tan başka ilah olmadığına şehadet ederim.

74.title: Cenaze Duası
74.meaning: Allah'ım! Onu bağışla ve ona merhamet et.

77.title: Regaib Gecesi
77.meaning: Allah'ı tesbih ederim ve hamd Allah'adır.

78.title: Miraç Kandili
78.meaning: Allah'ım! Peygamberinin şefaatini bize nasip et.

82.title: Arefe Günü
82.meaning: Allah'tan başka ilah yok, tektir, ortağı yoktur.

83.title: Kurban Bayramı
83.meaning: Allah en büyüktür, Allah'tan başka ilah yoktur.

85.title: Muharrem Ayı
85.meaning: Allah'ım! Bu ayı üzerimize bereket ve imanla helal kıl.

86.title: Şaban Ayı
86.meaning: Allah'ım! Şaban ayında bize bereket ver.

90.title: Bağışlanma
90.meaning: Rabbim! Beni bağışla ve bana merhamet et.

93.title: Af Dileme
93.meaning: Rabbim! Bağışla, merhamet et, sen merhametlilerin en hayırlısısın.

95.title: Samimi Tevbe
95.meaning: Kendisinden başka ilah olmayan Allah'tan bağışlanma dilerim.

97.title: Rahmet Dileme
97.meaning: Rabbimiz! Unutur veya yanılırsak bizi sorguya çekme.

101.title: Sübhaneke
101.meaning: Allah'ım! Seni hamd ile tesbih ederim.

105.title: Teşehhüd
105.meaning: Dil ile, beden ile, mal ile yapılan ibadetler Allah'adır.

109.title: Selam Verme
109.meaning: Selam ve Allah'ın rahmeti üzerinize olsun.

112.title: Üzüntü Duası
112.meaning: Senden başka ilah yoktur. Seni tesbih ederim. Ben zalimlerden oldum.

114.title: Sıkıntı Anında
114.meaning: Allah bana yeter, O'ndan başka ilah yoktur.

116.title: Zor Zamanlarda
116.meaning: Ey diri olan, ey kaim olan! Rahmetinle yardım dilerim.

117.title: Elem Giderme
117.meaning: Allah'ım! Kolaylaştırmadıkça hiçbir şey kolay olmaz.

119.title: Teselli Duası
119.meaning: Biz Allah'a aitiz ve O'na döneceğiz.

tafsir.title: Tafsir
tafsir.proRequired: Pro membership is required to read the full tafsir

special_days.name: Special Day Prayers
special_days.desc: Prayers for holy nights and festivals

1.title: Morning Prayer
1.meaning: We have entered the morning and so has the kingdom of Allah. Praise belongs to Allah.

2.title: Evening Prayer
2.meaning: We have entered the evening and so has the kingdom of Allah. Praise belongs to Allah.

3.title: Sleep Prayer
3.meaning: O Allah! In Your name I die and live.

4.title: Leaving Home Prayer
4.meaning: In the name of Allah, I put my trust in Allah.

5.title: Entering Home Prayer
5.meaning: O Allah! I ask You for the best entry and the best exit.

6.title: Ayatul Kursi
6.meaning: Allah, there is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of existence.

7.title: Glorification Prayer
7.meaning: Glory be to Allah and His is the praise.

8.title: Morning-Evening Protection
8.meaning: In the name of Allah with whose name nothing on earth or in heaven can cause harm.

9.title: Health Prayer
9.meaning: O Allah! Grant me health in my body.

10.title: Seeking Forgiveness
10.meaning: I seek forgiveness from Allah and I repent to Him.

11.title: Salawat
11.meaning: O Allah! Send blessings upon Muhammad.

12.title: Contentment Prayer
12.meaning: I am pleased with Allah as my Lord.

13.title: Praise Prayer
13.meaning: All praise is due to Allah.

14.title: Seeking Wellbeing
14.meaning: O Allah! I ask You for wellbeing.

15.title: Gratitude Prayer
15.meaning: O Allah! All praise and thanks are Yours.

16.title: Halal Sustenance Prayer
16.meaning: O Allah! Suffice me with what is lawful against what is unlawful.

17.title: Anxiety Protection
17.meaning: O Allah! I seek refuge in You from worry and grief.

18.title: Blessing Prayer
18.meaning: O Allah! Bless what You have provided us.

19.title: Pure Sustenance Prayer
19.meaning: O Allah! I ask You for pure sustenance.

20.title: Doors of Mercy Prayer
20.meaning: O Allah! Open for me the doors of Your mercy.

21.title: Gratitude for Blessings
21.meaning: My Lord! Inspire me to be grateful for Your blessings.

22.title: Wealth Prayer
22.meaning: O Allah! I ask You for sufficiency.

23.title: Lawful Earnings Prayer
23.meaning: O Allah! Provide me with lawful sustenance.

24.title: Ease Prayer
24.meaning: O Allah! There is no ease except what You make easy.

25.title: Hasbunallah
25.meaning: Allah is sufficient for us, and He is the best Disposer of affairs.

27.title: Taqwa and Solution
27.meaning: Whoever fears Allah, He will make a way out for him.

28.title: Family Happiness Prayer
28.meaning: Our Lord! Grant us from our spouses and offspring comfort to our eyes.

29.title: Marriage Blessing
29.meaning: May Allah bless you and send blessings upon you.

30.title: Righteous Offspring Prayer
30.meaning: My Lord! Grant me righteous offspring from Your presence.

31.title: Parents Prayer
31.meaning: My Lord! Have mercy on them as they raised me when I was small.

33.title: Prayer Establishment
33.meaning: My Lord! Make me an establisher of prayer, and from my descendants.

34.title: Hellfire Protection
34.meaning: Our Lord! Avert from us the punishment of Hell.

35.title: Mercy Prayer
35.meaning: Our Lord! Grant us mercy from Yourself.

36.title: Heart Steadfastness
36.meaning: Our Lord! Do not let our hearts deviate.

37.title: Neighbor Reconciliation
37.meaning: O Allah! Reconcile between us and our neighbors.

38.title: Submission Prayer
38.meaning: Our Lord! Make us submissive to You.

39.title: Good in Both Worlds
39.meaning: Our Lord! Give us good in this world and in the Hereafter.

40.title: Satan Protection
40.meaning: I seek refuge in Allah from the accursed Satan.

41.title: Mashallah Prayer
41.meaning: What Allah has willed, there is no power except with Allah.

42.title: Declaration of Faith
42.meaning: There is no deity except Allah, Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah.

43.title: Complete Words Protection
43.meaning: I seek refuge in Allah's perfect words from the evil of what He has created.

44.title: Healing Ruqyah
44.meaning: In the name of Allah, I perform ruqyah on you.

45.title: Surah An-Nas
45.meaning: Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind.

46.title: Islamic Nature Prayer
46.meaning: We have entered the morning upon the natural way of Islam.

47.title: Surah Al-Falaq
47.meaning: Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak.

48.title: Blessing Loss Protection
48.meaning: O Allah! I seek refuge in You from the loss of Your blessings.

49.title: La Hawla Prayer
49.meaning: There is no power nor strength except with Allah.

50.title: Heart Firmness
50.meaning: O Turner of hearts! Keep my heart firm upon Your religion.

51.title: Dajjal Fitnah Protection
51.meaning: O Allah! I seek refuge in You from the trial of the Dajjal.

52.title: Goodness in Both Worlds
52.meaning: Our Lord! Give us good in this world and good in the Hereafter.

53.title: Increase in Knowledge
53.meaning: My Lord! Increase me in knowledge.

54.title: Forgiveness of Sins
54.meaning: Our Lord! Forgive us our sins.

55.title: Straight Path
55.meaning: Guide us to the straight path.

56.title: Mercy Prayer
56.meaning: My Lord! Have mercy on us.

57.title: Patience Prayer
57.meaning: Our Lord! Pour upon us patience.

58.title: Ease Not Difficulty
58.meaning: My Lord! Make it easy, not difficult.

60.title: Among Righteous
60.meaning: Admit me by Your mercy among Your righteous servants.

61.title: Blessing Gratitude
61.meaning: My Lord! Inspire me to be grateful for Your blessings.

62.title: Hearing and Knowing
62.meaning: Our Lord! Accept from us. Indeed You are the Hearing, the Knowing.

63.title: Pardon Prayer
63.meaning: O Allah! You are Pardoning and love to pardon, so pardon me.

64.title: Qunut Prayer
64.meaning: O Allah! Guide me among those You have guided.

65.title: Master of Forgiveness
65.meaning: O Allah! You are my Lord. There is no deity except You.

66.title: Travel Prayer
66.meaning: Glory be to Him who has subjected this to us.

67.title: Meal Prayer
67.meaning: O Allah! Bless us in what You have provided.

68.title: Visiting the Sick
68.meaning: No harm, it will be a purification, if Allah wills.

69.title: Refuge from Satan
69.meaning: I seek refuge in Allah from the accursed Satan.

70.title: Grave Torment Protection
70.meaning: O Allah! I seek refuge in You from the punishment of the grave.

71.title: Mosque Entry Prayer
71.meaning: O Allah! Open the gates of Your mercy for me.

72.title: Mosque Exit Prayer
72.meaning: O Allah! I ask You from Your bounty.

73.title: Post-Ablution Testimony
73.meaning: I bear witness there is no deity except Allah.

74.title: Funeral Prayer
74.meaning: O Allah! Forgive him and have mercy on him.

75.title: Seeking Mercy
75.meaning: O Allah! I ask You by Your mercy.

76.title: Friday Salawat
76.meaning: O Allah! Send blessings upon our master Muhammad.

77.title: Tasbeeh
77.meaning: Glory be to Allah and praise be to Allah.

78.title: Intercession Prayer
78.meaning: O Allah! Grant us the intercession of Your Prophet.

80.title: Night of Power Prayer
80.meaning: O Allah! You are Pardoning and love to pardon, so pardon me.

81.title: Reaching Ramadan
81.meaning: O Allah! Let us reach Ramadan.

82.title: Tawheed Dhikr
82.meaning: There is no deity except Allah, alone without partner.

83.title: Eid Takbir
83.meaning: Allah is the Greatest, Allah is the Greatest, there is no deity except Allah.

84.title: Talbiyah
84.meaning: Here I am, O Allah, here I am at Your service.

85.title: New Moon Prayer
85.meaning: O Allah! Let it appear over us with blessing and faith.

86.title: Sha'ban Prayer
86.meaning: O Allah! Bless us in Sha'ban.

87.title: Blessed Days Prayer
87.meaning: O Allah! Make these days blessed for us.

90.title: Forgiveness and Mercy
90.meaning: My Lord! Forgive me and have mercy on me.

91.title: Self-Wrong Confession
91.meaning: O Allah! I have wronged myself.

92.title: Adam's Repentance
92.meaning: Our Lord! We have wronged ourselves.

93.title: Best of Forgivers
93.meaning: My Lord! Forgive and have mercy. You are the best of those who show mercy.

94.title: Purification from Sins
94.meaning: O Allah! Wash me from my sins.

95.title: Living and Sustaining
95.meaning: I seek forgiveness from Allah, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer.

96.title: Pardoning and Generous
96.meaning: O Allah! You are Pardoning and Generous.

97.title: Forgetting and Mistakes
97.meaning: Our Lord! Do not blame us if we forget or make mistakes.

98.title: Cleansing from Sins
98.meaning: O Allah! Cleanse me from sins.

101.title: Subhanaka
101.meaning: Glory be to You, O Allah! Praise be to You.

102.title: Surah Al-Fatiha
102.meaning: All praise is due to Allah, Lord of the worlds.

103.title: Ruku Tasbeeh
103.meaning: Glory be to my Lord, the Magnificent.

104.title: Sujood Tasbeeh
104.meaning: Glory be to my Lord, the Most High.

106.title: Allahumma Salli
106.meaning: O Allah! Send blessings upon Muhammad.

107.title: Allahumma Barik
107.meaning: O Allah! Bestow blessings upon Muhammad.

108.title: Rabbana Prayer
108.meaning: Our Lord! Give us good in this world.

109.title: Salam
109.meaning: Peace and mercy of Allah be upon you.

110.title: Post-Salam Prayer
110.meaning: O Allah! You are Peace (the Source of Peace).

111.title: Qunut Prayer
111.meaning: O Allah! We seek Your help.

112.title: Prophet Yunus Prayer
112.meaning: There is no deity except You. Glory be to You. Indeed I have been of the wrongdoers.

113.title: Grief Prayer
113.meaning: O Allah! I am Your servant.

114.title: Sufficiency Verse
114.meaning: Allah is sufficient for me. There is no deity except Him.

115.title: Hope for Mercy
115.meaning: O Allah! I hope for Your mercy.

116.title: Living and Sustaining
116.meaning: O Ever-Living, O Sustainer! I seek help through Your mercy.

117.title: Difficulty to Ease
117.meaning: O Allah! Nothing is easy except what You make easy.

118.title: Grief Protection
118.meaning: O Allah! I seek refuge in You from grief.

119.title: Calamity Prayer
119.meaning: Indeed we belong to Allah and to Him we shall return.

120.title: Rain of Patience
120.meaning: Our Lord! Pour upon us patience.

121.title: Allah is With Me
121.meaning: Allah is with me, Allah is watching over me.

122.title: Hope Verse
122.meaning: Do not despair of the mercy of Allah.

123.title: Tawakkul Verse
123.meaning: And upon Allah let the believers rely.

hatim.title: Group Khatm
hatim.noHatims: You haven't joined any khatm yet.

dua.title: Prayer Requests
dua.noDuas: No prayer requests yet. Be the first!

family.title: Huzur Family

goals.desc: To be completed by end of Ramadan

groups.title: Family Groups
groups.noGroups: You are not a member of any group yet.
groups.requestSent: Your request has been sent. Waiting for admin approval.

family.intro: Add your family members to track spiritual growth together.
family.inviteTip: Share this code with your family to invite them.
family.prayerTreeDesc: Each prayer is like a drop of water. Grow your tree by praying!
family.treeTip: Your tree grows with daily prayer!

hatimCoach.title: Smart Khatm Coach
hatimCoach.welcomeDesc: Let's create a personalized plan for you to reach your goal. You can plan by target date or daily page limit.
hatimCoach.setupDesc: When do you want to finish your Khatm? Select your target date and we'll calculate your daily reading goal.

weeklySermon.title: Weekly Sermon
weeklySermon.description: Official sermon publications from the Presidency of Religious Affairs
weeklySermon.note: Sermons are published every Friday by the Presidency of Religious Affairs. You can access the latest sermon from the sources above.

themeSelector.title: Theme Selection
themeSelector.tipText: Your theme preference is saved and applied automatically whenever the app opens.

support.title: Support
support.description: Send us your problems or suggestions
support.emailHint: Write your email if you want us to get back to you
support.messagePlaceholder: Write your issue or suggestion in detail...
support.successBodyLine2: It will be reviewed as soon as possible.

errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

muezzinSelector.title: Muezzin Selection
muezzinSelector.description: Choose your preferred maqam for adhan notifications
muezzinSelector.noteText: Your selected maqam will be used as the notification sound at the next adhan time. Audio files may need to be available on your device.

limitModal.title: Daily Limit Reached
limitModal.tomorrowOption: You will have 2 new uses tomorrow

weeklyChallenges.title: Weekly Challenges
weeklyChallenges.subtitle: Complete this week's goals and collect rewards!

challengeDescriptions.quran_week: Read 7 juz of Quran this week
challengeDescriptions.namaz_week: Pray 40 rakats of nafl prayers this week
challengeDescriptions.sabah_week: Pray Fajr on time for 7 days this week
challengeDescriptions.tespihat_week: Complete tasbih (morning/evening) for 7 days this week
challengeDescriptions.charity_week: Give charity for 7 days this week

streakProtection.title: Your Streak Is at Risk!
streakProtection.description: Since you missed yesterday, your {{count}}-day {{category}} streak is about to reset.

streak24h.title: 24-Hour Recovery
streak24h.description: It looks like your {{category}} streak missed one day. Recover it within 24 hours to protect your streak.

streakRecovery.adError: Ad could not be loaded. Please try again.
streakRecovery.genericError: An error occurred. Please try again.
streakRecovery.title: Recover Your Streak
streakRecovery.successMessage: Congrats! Your {{count}}-day streak has been protected.
streakRecovery.description: You can protect your streak within 24 hours by watching an ad.
streakRecovery.oneTimeUse: This right can be used once per week.
streakRecovery.footerText: After watching the full ad, your streak will be protected automatically.

feedback.excellent: Excellent! You have mastered tajweed rules.
feedback.good: Great start! With more practice, you can perfect it.
feedback.retry: How about reviewing the lessons once more?

quranMemorize.title: Memorization Assistant
quranMemorize.subtitle: Memorize, Review, Reinforce

empty.title: Great job!
empty.description: No surah left to review today.

quranMemorize.reviewQuestion: How well do you remember this surah?

prayerTeacher.title: Prayer Teacher
prayerTeacher.stepsDescription: Tap the cards below to learn the steps of prayer.
prayerTeacher.recitationsDescription: Recitations and surahs read during prayer.
prayerTeacher.typesDescription: Rakat counts and details of the 5 daily prayers.
prayerTeacher.invalidatorsDescription: List of actions that invalidate prayer.

feedback.excellent: Excellent! You know it very well!
feedback.good: Good! You can improve with more practice.
feedback.retry: It is recommended to review again.

nafilePrayers.title: Nafl Prayers
nafilePrayers.subtitle: Track your sunnah and nafl worship

info.title: About Nafl Prayers
info.item1: Nafl prayers are optional prayers performed besides obligatory prayers.
info.item2: Each nafl prayer should have its own intention.
info.item3: Nafl prayers help with forgiveness of sins.
info.item4: Regular nafl prayer builds good habits.

prayerCircle.title: Prayer Circle
prayerCircle.intro: The supplication of a believer for their fellow believer in their absence is accepted. Let us pray for each other.

meditation.title: Islamic Contemplation
meditation.description: Find inner peace with breathing exercises and contemplation. Each session is an invitation to a spiritual journey.
meditation.breathe: Breathe in deeply... Release... Focus on your Lord...

licenses.title: Licenses & Sources
licenses.thanksDesc: This application is made possible by the contributions of open source projects and communities that provide Islamic content. All recitations and content are streamed from their respective sources.
licenses.disclaimerDesc: All Quran recitations and content are streamed through their respective API providers. This content is not stored within the application. All copyrights belong to their respective owners.

tafsir.title: Tafsir
tafsir.proRequired: Pro membership is required to read the full tafsir
tafsir.externalSource: This source is displayed from the Diyanet website.

missedPrayers.title: Missed Prayers Tracker
missedPrayers.confirmRecalculate: Existing data will be deleted. Do you want to continue?
missedPrayers.note: When you make up a missed prayer, press '-' to decrease the count.

gamification.streakTip: Try to keep your streak by performing your worship on time every day!

streakFeature.title: Streak Calendar
streakFeature.tipText: By recording your worship every day for 7 days, you can earn 1 Freeze Card!

weeklyGoal.title: Weekly Goal
weeklyGoal.description: How many days per week do you want to track your worship?

zakatCalculator.title: Zakat Calculator
zakatCalculator.whatIsZakatBody: Zakat is giving 2.5% of wealth that has reached the nisab threshold and been held for one year. Nisab is the value of 80.18 grams of gold or 561.2 grams of silver.

onboarding.languageDescription: Wherever you are, we accompany your spiritual journey in your own language.
onboarding.locationDescription: Allow location access for accurate prayer times and qibla direction in your city.
onboarding.notificationDescription: Enable notifications so you don’t miss prayer and dhikr reminders.
onboarding.firstActionDescription: Take the first step on your spiritual journey today.

invite.modalDescription: Buat dan bagikan tautan undangan. Pantau progres referral Anda di bawah.
